skills.name: frontend-design
skills.description: Aesthetic direction for designs outside an existing brand system

skills.name: design-aesthetic-presets
skills.description: Pick one of eleven named aesthetic directions before writing any code, then execute it with discipline

skills.name: design-critique
skills.description: Run a structured anti-slop audit on the design just produced before declaring done

skills.name: design-md-author
skills.description: Read or write a Google-spec DESIGN.md at the project root — the cross-tool aesthetic spec that grounds every prompt in this project

skills.name: create-design-system
skills.description: Skill to use if user asks you to create a design system or UI kit

skills.name: save-as-standalone-html
skills.description: Single self-contained file that works offline

skills.name: send-to-canva
skills.description: Export as an editable Canva design

skills.name: export
skills.description: Export a selected element as PNG / JPEG / OGraf for video editors. Provider-agnostic — the AI calls capabilities by id, the host's adapter (MCP today, OpenAI-tools later) routes the call.
